work_completed: Self-registered as GitHub Copilot session c9d4 in docs/agent-log/registrations/2026-05-02-copilot-c9d4.json

Assessed THREAD-001 scope — confirmed all governance file deliverables (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, docs/, templates/, SOPs/, ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent-escalation.md, ISSUE_TEMPLATE/governance-proposal.md, .nltotoi/) already exist in the repo from prior sessions

Created .github/workflows/sync-governance-public.yml — GitHub Actions workflow that syncs canonical governance files from solidarity-framework to NeuroLift-Technologies/.github on push to main/master (path-filtered) and supports workflow_dispatch with dry-run option
Workflow syncs: AGENTS.md, NLT-DEV-OTOI.md, SOPs/, templates/, ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent-escalation.md, ISSUE_TEMPLATE/governance-proposal.md, PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/agent-contribution.md, .nltotoi/
Marked THREAD-001 as Complete and moved it to Completed Threads in docs/active-threads.md
Updated active-threads.md — Active Threads section is now empty (no active threads remain)
blockers: None — workflow is created. However, a human (Joshua W. Dorsey, Sr.) must add the GOVERNANCE_SYNC_TOKEN secret to the solidarity-framework repository settings before the workflow can push to NeuroLift-Technologies/.github. Instructions: create a GitHub PAT with 'contents: write' scope on NeuroLift-Technologies/.github and add it as a repository secret named GOVERNANCE_SYNC_TOKEN at Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions.

decisions_made.decision: The sync workflow targets AGENTS.md, NLT-DEV-OTOI.md, SOPs/, templates/, ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent-escalation.md, ISSUE_TEMPLATE/governance-proposal.md, PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/agent-contribution.md, and .nltotoi/ — but NOT CLAUDE.md or docs/
decisions_made.rationale: CLAUDE.md is repo-specific (each NLT repo has its own) and should not be synced from solidarity-framework. docs/ contains agent-log entries, escalations, and active-threads which are internal to this repo and should not be published to the public .github repo.

decisions_made.decision: Workflow uses actions/checkout@v4 with a PAT token (GOVERNANCE_SYNC_TOKEN) for cross-repo push
decisions_made.rationale: This is the standard GitHub Actions pattern for pushing to another repository. No additional third-party actions are introduced. Security advisory check passed for actions/checkout@v4.

decisions_made.decision: Workflow includes a dry_run input option for workflow_dispatch
decisions_made.rationale: Allows Joshua or other maintainers to verify what would be synced before committing to a live push, especially useful for the first bootstrap run.

decisions_pending.decision: Joshua W. Dorsey, Sr. must create and register the GOVERNANCE_SYNC_TOKEN secret before the workflow can run

handoff_record.next_agent_notes: All active threads are now closed. The repo has no active threads. The sync-governance-public.yml workflow is in place and ready — it just needs the GOVERNANCE_SYNC_TOKEN secret to be configured by a human. To trigger the first bootstrap sync manually, go to Actions → Sync Governance Files to Public .github Repo → Run workflow (with dry_run: true first to verify, then dry_run: false to push).
tests_run: None — workflow YAML syntax validated manually; no existing test suite covers GitHub Actions workflows
